sections.paragraph:
constr. זְהַב (once זֲהַב Gen 2:12), m.

(1) gold (Arab. ذَهَبُ, Syr., Chald. ܕܰܗܒܳܐ, דְּהַב id.), Gen 24:22, 53 Gen 24:53 Exo 3:22 36:38 , etc. When preceded by numerals, the weight שֶׁקֵל is understood, e.g. Gen 24:22, עֲשָׁרָה זָהָב “ten (shekels) of gold.”

(2) metaph. of the golden splendour of the heavens, perhaps of the sun itself, Job 37:22 of the purest oil, brilliant like gold (hell wie Gold), Zec 4:12.
